ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code for the exchange (e.g., NFO) */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the exchange in HH:MM format */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., Options, Futures) */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Code for the underlying stock or asset */,
  "underlying_asset" TEXT /* The underlying asset of the instrument */,
  "contract_size" INTEGER /* The size of the contract */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "lot_size" INTEGER /* The minimum number of contracts that can be traded */,
  "tick_size" REAL /* The smallest price increment for the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the data belongs to */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the option or future */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the option or future */,
  "right" TEXT /* Right of the option (e.g., Call, Put) */,
  "ltp" REAL /* Last traded price of the instrument */,
  "ltt" TEXT /* Last traded time of the instrument */,
  "best_bid_price" REAL /* Best bid price of the instrument */,
  "best_bid_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity available at the best bid price */,
  "best_offer_price" REAL /* Best offer price of the instrument */,
  "best_offer_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity available at the best offer price */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The total volume of trades for the instrument */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* The total number of outstanding contracts */,
  "high_price" REAL /* The highest price of the instrument during the trading session */,
  "low_price" REAL /* The lowest price of the instrument during the trading session */,
  "change" REAL /* The change in price from the previous close */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* The percentage change in price from the previous close */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_strike_price FOREIGN KEY ("strike_price") REFERENCES strike_prices ("strike_price"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_expiry_date FOREIGN KEY ("expiry_date") REFERENCES expiry_dates ("expiry_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_right FOREIGN KEY ("right") REFERENCES rights ("right")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strike_prices" (
  "strike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strike price */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price value */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the strike price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expiry_dates" (
  "expiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expiry date */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date value */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the expiry date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expiry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rights" (
  "right_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each right */,
  "right" TEXT /* Right value (e.g., Call, Put) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the right */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("right_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_and_alerts" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument related to the news */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "news_text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the news or alert */,
  "urgency" TEXT /* The urgency level of the news or alert */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the news or alert */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the news or alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_and_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument related to the trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was identified */,
  "trend_text" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* The type of trend (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "trend_strength" TEXT /* The strength of the trend (e.g., strong, moderate, weak) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
